runs.final_dockerfile:
# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build ViMusic Android app from source and package the built APK
# Stage 1: builder with Android SDK to compile the project
FROM gradle:jdk17 AS builder

# Install required system tools
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        unzip \
        curl \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Android SDK setup
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/opt/android-sdk
ENV PATH="${PATH}:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools"

RUN mkdir -p ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools && \
    mkdir -p ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools

# Download and install Android command-line tools robustly (try multiple known versions) and required components
RUN set -e; \
    SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}; \
    TMPZIP=/tmp/cmdline-tools.zip; \
    URLS="https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-9477386_latest.zip https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-8512540_latest.zip https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-6858069_latest.zip"; \
    for URL in $URLS; do \
        if curl -fL -o ${TMPZIP} $URL; then \
            unzip -q ${TMPZIP} -d ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools; \
            rm -f ${TMPZIP}; \
            break; \
        fi; \
    done; \
    if [ ! -d "${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools" ]; then \
        echo "Failed to download commandlinetools.zip"; exit 1; \
    fi; \
    # Normalize layout to a stable 'latest' path by detecting sdkmanager location
    if [ -f "${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools/bin/sdkmanager" ]; then \
        ln -s ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools/bin/sdkmanager /usr/local/bin/sdkmanager; \
    elif [ -f "${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager" ]; then \
        ln -s ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager /usr/local/bin/sdkmanager; \
    elif [ -f "${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin/sdkmanager" ]; then \
        ln -s ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin/sdkmanager /usr/local/bin/sdkmanager; \
    else \
        echo "sdkmanager not found in any expected location"; exit 1; \
    fi

# Ensure sdkmanager is executable
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/sdkmanager

ENV PATH="${PATH}:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools:/usr/local/bin"

# Accept licenses and install required platforms/build-tools
RUN yes | sdkmanager --licenses && \
    sdkmanager "platform-tools" \
               "platforms;android-33" \
               "build-tools;33.0.0"

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the project source
COPY . .

# Build the debug variant
RUN chmod +x ./gradlew
RUN ./gradlew assembleDebug

# Stage 2: runtime image containing the built APK
FROM debian:bookworm-slim

RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built APK from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk /app/app-debug.apk

# Provide a shell so users can inspect the container or copy the APK out
CMD ["sh", "-c", "echo 'Built APK located at /app/app-debug.apk'; exec /bin/sh"]

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build ViMusic Android app from source and package the built APK
# Stage 1: builder with Android SDK to compile the project
FROM gradle:jdk25 AS builder

# Install required system tools
RUN apt-get update -y \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        unzip \
        curl \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Android SDK setup
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/opt/android-sdk
ENV PATH="${PATH}:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools"

RUN mkdir -p ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools && \
    mkdir -p ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools

# Download and install Android command-line tools
# Using a recent version of the commandlinetools. If this URL changes, please adjust accordingly
RUN curl -fsSL -o /tmp/commandlinetools.zip \
      https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-8512540_latest.zip && \
    unzip /tmp/commandlinetools.zip -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools && \
    mv ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/commandlinetools-linux-*/ ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest && \
    rm -f /tmp/commandlinetools.zip

ENV PATH="${PATH}:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools"

# Accept licenses and install required platforms/build-tools
RUN yes | sdkmanager --licenses && \
    sdkmanager "platform-tools" \
               "platforms;android-33" \
               "build-tools;33.0.0"

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the project source
COPY . .

# Build the debug variant
RUN ./gradlew assembleDebug

# Stage 2: runtime image containing the built APK
FROM debian:bookworm-slim

RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built APK from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk /app/app-debug.apk

# Provide a shell so users can inspect the container or copy the APK out
CMD ["sh", "-c", "echo 'Built APK located at /app/app-debug.apk'; exec /bin/sh"]
"}

{"path": ".dockerignore", "content": "# Ignore Android-related build outputs and IDE metadata
**/build/
**/.gradle/
.gradle/
**/*.iml
.idea/
.local/
*.log
**/out/
*/**/*.apk
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build ViMusic Android app from source and package the built APK
# Stage 1: builder with Android SDK to compile the project
FROM gradle:jdk17 AS builder

# Install required system tools
RUN apt-get update -y \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        unzip \
        curl \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Android SDK setup
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/opt/android-sdk
ENV PATH="${PATH}:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools"

RUN mkdir -p ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools && \
    mkdir -p ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools

# Download and install Android command-line tools robustly (latest) and required components
RUN set -eux; \
    TOOLZIP=/tmp/commandlinetools.zip; \
    URL_BASE="https://dl.google.com/android/repository"; \
    TOOL_ZIP=$(curl -sS ${URL_BASE}/commandlinetools-linux/index.html | grep -o 'commandlinetools-linux-[^\"]*_latest.zip' | head -n1); \
    if [ -z "${TOOL_ZIP}" ]; then echo "Failed to detect latest commandlinetools zip"; exit 1; fi; \
    curl -fLo ${TOOLZIP} ${URL_BASE}/commandlinetools-linux/${TOOL_ZIP}; \
    unzip -q ${TOOLZIP} -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools; \
    rm -f ${TOOLZIP}; \
    # Move extracted dir to a stable 'latest' path
    mv ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/commandlinetools-linux-*/ ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest

ENV PATH="${PATH}:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools"

# Accept licenses and install required platforms/build-tools
RUN yes | sdkmanager --licenses && \
    sdkmanager "platform-tools" \
               "platforms;android-33" \
               "build-tools;33.0.0"

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the project source
COPY . .

# Build the debug variant
RUN ./gradlew assembleDebug

# Stage 2: runtime image containing the built APK
FROM debian:bookworm-slim

RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built APK from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk /app/app-debug.apk

# Provide a shell so users can inspect the container or copy the APK out
CMD ["sh", "-c", "echo 'Built APK located at /app/app-debug.apk'; exec /bin/sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build ViMusic Android app from source and package the built APK
# Stage 1: builder with Android SDK to compile the project
FROM gradle:jdk17 AS builder

# Install required system tools
RUN apt-get update -y \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        unzip \
        curl \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Android SDK setup
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/opt/android-sdk
ENV PATH="${PATH}:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools"

RUN mkdir -p ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools && \
    mkdir -p ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools

# Download and install Android command-line tools robustly (latest) and required components
RUN set -eux; \
    SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}; \
    curl -fLo /tmp/commandlinetools.zip https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip; \
    unzip -q /tmp/commandlinetools.zip -d ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools; \
    # Normalize possible layouts to a stable 'latest' path
    if [ -d "${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools" ]; then \
        mv ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest; \
    elif [ -d "${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/tools" ]; then \
        mv ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/tools ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest; \
    else \
        echo "Unexpected cmdline-tools layout"; \
        exit 1; \
    fi; \
    rm -f /tmp/commandlinetools.zip

ENV PATH="${PATH}:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools"

# Accept licenses and install required platforms/build-tools
RUN yes | sdkmanager --licenses && \
    sdkmanager "platform-tools" \
               "platforms;android-33" \
               "build-tools;33.0.0"

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the project source
COPY . .

# Build the debug variant
RUN ./gradlew assembleDebug

# Stage 2: runtime image containing the built APK
FROM debian:bookworm-slim

RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built APK from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk /app/app-debug.apk

# Provide a shell so users can inspect the container or copy the APK out
CMD ["sh", "-c", "echo 'Built APK located at /app/app-debug.apk'; exec /bin/sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build ViMusic Android app from source and package the built APK
# Stage 1: builder with Android SDK to compile the project
FROM gradle:jdk17 AS builder

# Install required system tools
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        unzip \
        curl \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Android SDK setup
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/opt/android-sdk
ENV PATH="${PATH}:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools"

RUN mkdir -p ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools && \
    mkdir -p ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools

# Download and install Android command-line tools robustly (latest) and required components
RUN set -e; \
    SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}; \
    TMPZIP=/tmp/commandlinetools.zip; \
    URLs="https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-9477386_latest.zip https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-8512540_latest.zip https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-6858069_latest.zip"; \
    for URL in $URLs; do \
        if curl -fL -o ${TMPZIP} $URL; then \
            break; \
        fi; \
    done; \
    if [ ! -f ${TMPZIP} ]; then \
        echo "Failed to download commandlinetools.zip"; \
        exit 1; \
    fi; \
    unzip -q ${TMPZIP} -d ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools; \
    # Normalize layout to latest
    if [ -d "${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/commandlinetools-linux-*/" ]; then \
        dir=$(ls -d ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/commandlinetools-linux-*/ | head -n1); \
        rmdir ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/commandlinetools-linux-* 2>/dev/null || true; \
        mv ${dir} ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest; \
    elif [ -d "${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/tools" ]; then \
        mv ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/tools ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest; \
    else \
        echo "Unexpected cmdline-tools layout"; exit 1; \
    fi; \
    rm -f ${TMPZIP}

ENV PATH="${PATH}:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools"

# Accept licenses and install required platforms/build-tools
RUN yes | sdkmanager --licenses && \
    sdkmanager "platform-tools" \
               "platforms;android-33" \
               "build-tools;33.0.0"

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the project source and ensure wrapper is executable
COPY . .
RUN chmod +x ./gradlew

# Build the debug variant
RUN ./gradlew assembleDebug

# Stage 2: runtime image containing the built APK
FROM debian:bookworm-slim

RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built APK from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk /app/app-debug.apk

# Provide a shell so users can inspect the container or copy the APK out
CMD ["sh", "-c", "echo 'Built APK located at /app/app-debug.apk'; exec /bin/sh"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build ViMusic Android app from source and package the built APK
# Stage 1: builder with Android SDK to compile the project using CircleCI Android image (includes SDK/Gradle)
FROM circleci/android:api33 AS builder

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the project source
COPY . .

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x ./gradlew

# Build the debug variant
RUN ./gradlew assembleDebug

# Stage 2: runtime image containing the built APK
FROM debian:bookworm-slim

RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built APK from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk /app/app-debug.apk

# Provide a shell so users can inspect the container or copy the APK out
CMD ["sh", "-c", "echo 'Built APK located at /app/app-debug.apk'; exec /bin/sh"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build ViMusic Android app from source and package the built APK
# Stage 1: builder with Android SDK to compile the project
FROM gradle:jdk17 AS builder

# Install required system tools
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        unzip \
        curl \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Android SDK setup
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/opt/android-sdk
ENV PATH="${PATH}:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools"

RUN mkdir -p ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools && \
    mkdir -p ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools

# Download and install Android command-line tools robustly (try multiple known versions) and required components
RUN set -e; \
    SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}; \
    TMPZIP=/tmp/cmdline-tools.zip; \
    URLS="https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-9477386_latest.zip https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-8512540_latest.zip https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-6858069_latest.zip"; \
    for URL in $URLS; do \
        if curl -fL -o ${TMPZIP} $URL; then \
            unzip -q ${TMPZIP} -d ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools; \
            rm -f ${TMPZIP}; \
            break; \
        fi; \
    done; \
    if [ ! -d "${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools" ]; then \
        echo "Failed to download commandlinetools.zip"; exit 1; \
    fi; \
    # Normalize layout to a stable 'latest' path by detecting sdkmanager location
    if [ -f "${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools/bin/sdkmanager" ]; then \
        ln -s ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools/bin/sdkmanager /usr/local/bin/sdkmanager; \
    elif [ -f "${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager" ]; then \
        ln -s ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager /usr/local/bin/sdkmanager; \
    elif [ -f "${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin/sdkmanager" ]; then \
        ln -s ${SDK_ROOT}/cmdline-tools/latest/bin/sdkmanager /usr/local/bin/sdkmanager; \
    else \
        echo "sdkmanager not found in any expected location"; exit 1; \
    fi

# Ensure sdkmanager is executable
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/sdkmanager

ENV PATH="${PATH}:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platform-tools:/usr/local/bin"

# Accept licenses and install required platforms/build-tools
RUN yes | sdkmanager --licenses && \
    sdkmanager "platform-tools" \
               "platforms;android-33" \
               "build-tools;33.0.0"

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the project source
COPY . .

# Build the debug variant
RUN chmod +x ./gradlew
RUN ./gradlew assembleDebug

# Stage 2: runtime image containing the built APK
FROM debian:bookworm-slim

RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built APK from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk /app/app-debug.apk

# Provide a shell so users can inspect the container or copy the APK out
CMD ["sh", "-c", "echo 'Built APK located at /app/app-debug.apk'; exec /bin/sh"]
"}
